acceptance_targets: [chapter_18_f02] Across the revised spans anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:111, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:145, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:183, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:203, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:209, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:229, no more than two sentence-level negation/correction pivots remain, and each surviving instance marks a distinct turn in pressure rather than routine emphasis. The surrounding prose must show visibly different sentence shapes when read aloud.

findings.acceptance_test: Across the revised spans anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:111, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:145, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:183, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:203, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:209, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:229, no more than two sentence-level negation/correction pivots remain, and each surviving instance marks a distinct turn in pressure rather than routine emphasis. The surrounding prose must show visibly different sentence shapes when read aloud.
findings.problem: A repeated negation-and-correction cadence becomes a prose tic across the chapter: 'Not fully. Not honestly. But worked,' 'not victorious, not healed,' 'Not sloppy,' 'Forward was not dramatic,' and related not/but pivots. The rhythm is effective once or twice, but at this frequency it starts to sound pre-shaped rather than discovered in Lena's thought.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the clusters around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:111, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:145, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:183, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:203, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:209, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:229 to vary sentence architecture. Keep the strongest single negation pivot where the scene truly turns, but replace the other instances with affirmative sensory, social, or material phrasing so Lena's interior rhythm does not flatten into one reusable template.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the embarrassing specifics: transfer amounts, body awkwardness, neighborhood petty detail, ugly motives, and the unstable overlap between care and control. When a choice arises between a safer generalized line and a sharper socially revealing one, choose the sharper line unless it breaks character truth.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches sex, money shame, betrayal, or bodily disgust and the prose flinches into summary or tasteful fog, revise toward concrete action, sensory residue, and social consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are normal in almost all spoken English here; full forms are reserved for emphasis, class performance, or moments of deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressed one-scene chapters with socially dense multi-scene chapters; follow hot chapters with quiet domestic ones, let comic humiliation sit beside grief, and vary dialogue density so no two consecutive chapters share the same pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsanitized, class-attentive English with enough lyric lift to surprise but not enough polish to float above the bodies and bills in the room.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: tight third person centered on Lena, with no head-hopping; June and Eli are knowable only through what Lena hears, sees, infers, and later uncovers in artifacts.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive sentences that can hold embarrassment and desire in the same line, then snap short at moments of exposure or financial pain.
